<!DOCTYPE html><html lang="en"><head><meta charSet="utf-8" data-next-head=""/><meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width" data-next-head=""/><title data-next-head="">OpenRouter Free Models: All 27 Listed (Jun 2026)</title><meta name="robots" content="index,follow" data-next-head=""/><meta name="description" content="All free AI models on OpenRouter — zero cost, no credit card. Compare context lengths, capabilities, and rate limits. Updated live." data-next-head=""/><meta property="og:title" content="OpenRouter Free Models: All 27 Listed (Jun 2026)" data-next-head=""/><meta property="og:description" content="All free AI models on OpenRouter — zero cost, no credit card. Compare context lengths, capabilities, and rate limits. Updated live." data-next-head=""/><meta property="og:url" content="https://costgoat.com/pricing/openrouter-free-models" data-next-head=""/><meta property="og:image" content="https://costgoat.com/og-image.png" data-next-head=""/><link rel="canonical" href="https://costgoat.com/pricing/openrouter-free-models" data-next-head=""/><meta property="article:published_time" content="2026-02-14T00:00:00Z" data-next-head=""/><meta property="article:modified_time" content="2026-06-21T03:52:28.255Z" data-next-head=""/><script type="application/ld+json" data-next-head="">{"@context":"https://schema.org","@type":"FAQPage","mainEntity":[{"@type":"Question","name":"Are OpenRouter free models really free?","acceptedAnswer":{"@type":"Answer","text":"Yes. OpenRouter offers select models at zero cost — no API key charges, no hidden fees. Free models are subsidized by OpenRouter and have rate limits (typically 20 requests/minute, 200 requests/day). You do need an OpenRouter account and API key, but there's no credit card required."}},{"@type":"Question","name":"What are the rate limits on OpenRouter free models?","acceptedAnswer":{"@type":"Answer","text":"Free models on OpenRouter typically have a limit of 20 requests per minute and 200 requests per day. If you hit the limit, you'll get a 429 error. These limits reset daily. For higher throughput, you can add credits to your account or use paid model variants."}},{"@type":"Question","name":"What is the best free model on OpenRouter for coding?","acceptedAnswer":{"@type":"Answer","text":"Qwen3 Coder is currently the strongest free coding model on OpenRouter, with a 1M context window and state-of-the-art code generation. DeepSeek V4 Flash is also excellent for reasoning-heavy coding tasks (1M context, native reasoning). For lighter or more general work, Llama 3.3 70B and OpenAI's GPT-OSS 120B are solid options."}},{"@type":"Question","name":"Can I use OpenRouter free models in production?","acceptedAnswer":{"@type":"Answer","text":"You can, but it's not recommended for production workloads due to rate limits and potential availability changes. Free models may be removed or have limits adjusted without notice. For production use, add credits to your OpenRouter account and use paid model variants for guaranteed availability."}},{"@type":"Question","name":"How do I use OpenRouter free models?","acceptedAnswer":{"@type":"Answer","text":"Sign up at openrouter.ai, get your API key, and use any free model ID (ending in :free) with the OpenRouter API. The API is OpenAI-compatible, so you can use it with any OpenAI SDK by changing the base URL to https://openrouter.ai/api/v1. No credits needed for free models."}}]}</script><noscript data-n-css=""></noscript><script defer="" noModule="" src="/_next/static/chunks/polyfills-42372ed130431b0a.js"></script><script dotted;-webkit-text-decoration:underline dotted;text-decoration:underline dotted;}:where(b, <!DOCTYPE html><html lang="en"><head><meta charSet="utf-8" data-next-head=""/><meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width" data-next-head=""/><title data-next-head="">OpenRouter Free Models: All 27 Listed (Jun 2026)</title><meta name="robots" content="index,follow" data-next-head=""/><meta name="description" content="All free AI models on OpenRouter — zero cost, no credit card. Compare context lengths, capabilities, and rate limits. Updated live." data-next-head=""/><meta property="og:title" content="OpenRouter Free Models: All 27 Listed (Jun 2026)" data-next-head=""/><meta property="og:description" content="All free AI models on OpenRouter — zero cost, no credit card. Compare context lengths, capabilities, and rate limits. Updated live." data-next-head=""/><meta property="og:url" content="https://costgoat.com/pricing/openrouter-free-models" data-next-head=""/><meta property="og:image" content="https://costgoat.com/og-image.png" data-next-head=""/><link rel="canonical" href="https://costgoat.com/pricing/openrouter-free-models" data-next-head=""/><meta property="article:published_time" content="2026-02-14T00:00:00Z" data-next-head=""/><meta property="article:modified_time" content="2026-06-21T03:52:28.255Z" data-next-head=""/><script type="application/ld+json" data-next-head="">{"@context":"https://schema.org","@type":"FAQPage","mainEntity":[{"@type":"Question","name":"Are OpenRouter free models really free?","acceptedAnswer":{"@type":"Answer","text":"Yes. OpenRouter offers select models at zero cost — no API key charges, no hidden fees. Free models are subsidized by OpenRouter and have rate limits (typically 20 requests/minute, 200 requests/day). You do need an OpenRouter account and API key, but there's no credit card required."}},{"@type":"Question","name":"What are the rate limits on OpenRouter free models?","acceptedAnswer":{"@type":"Answer","text":"Free models on OpenRouter typically have a limit of 20 requests per minute and 200 requests per day. If you hit the limit, you'll get a 429 error. These limits reset daily. For higher throughput, you can add credits to your account or use paid model variants."}},{"@type":"Question","name":"What is the best free model on OpenRouter for coding?","acceptedAnswer":{"@type":"Answer","text":"Qwen3 Coder is currently the strongest free coding model on OpenRouter, with a 1M context window and state-of-the-art code generation. DeepSeek V4 Flash is also excellent for reasoning-heavy coding tasks (1M context, native reasoning). For lighter or more general work, Llama 3.3 70B and OpenAI's GPT-OSS 120B are solid options."}},{"@type":"Question","name":"Can I use OpenRouter free models in production?","acceptedAnswer":{"@type":"Answer","text":"You can, but it's not recommended for production workloads due to rate limits and potential availability changes. Free models may be removed or have limits adjusted without notice. For production use, add credits to your OpenRouter account and use paid model variants for guaranteed availability."}},{"@type":"Question","name":"How do I use OpenRouter free models?","acceptedAnswer":{"@type":"Answer","text":"Sign up at openrouter.ai, get your API key, and use any free model ID (ending in :free) with the OpenRouter API. The API is OpenAI-compatible, so you can use it with any OpenAI SDK by changing the base URL to https://openrouter.ai/api/v1. No credits needed for free models."}}]}</script><noscript data-n-css=""></noscript><script defer="" noModule="" src="/_next/static/chunks/polyfills-42372ed130431b0a.js"></script><script findings.title: Ollama API
findings.description: Free tier with qualitative usage limits. 400+ models from Ollama library. Not OpenAI SDK-compatible; uses [Ollama API](https://docs.ollama.com/cloud). [^3]
findings.raw_text: Free tier with qualitative usage limits. 400+ models from Ollama library. Not OpenAI SDK-compatible; uses [Ollama API](https://docs.ollama.com/cloud). [^3]

findings.title: limits
findings.description: [^6]: API-Inference is free for registered users. Current published limits are 2,000 requests/day per user (total across models), with per-model daily quotas dynamically adjusted and capped at 500; concurrency is also dynamically rate-limited. Requires Alibaba Cloud account binding and real-name verification ([limits](https://modelscope.cn/docs/model-service/API-Inference/limits), [intro](https://modelscope.cn/docs/model-service/API-Inference/intro)).
findings.raw_text: [^6]: API-Inference is free for registered users. findings.title: available regions
findings.description: [^1]: Free tier not available in the EU, UK, or Switzerland ([available regions](https://ai.google.dev/gemini-api/docs/available-regions)).
